Programs

Find Your
Perfect Program

From first steps to competitive excellence, we have a program for every gymnast.

Ages 3+

Recreational Classes

Perfect for beginners! Our recreational program focuses on building foundational skills in a fun, supportive environment. Gymnasts learn basic body movements, apparatus handling, and develop flexibility and coordination.

  • Fun-focused learning
  • All apparatus introduction
  • Flexibility & strength
  • No competition required
Learn More
By Invitation

Pre-Team

The bridge to competitive gymnastics. Pre-Team athletes develop the skills and discipline needed for our competitive program while still enjoying a balanced approach to training.

  • Skill development focus
  • Intro to routines
  • Increased training time
  • Competition preparation
Learn More
USAG Levels 3-10

Competitive Team

For dedicated athletes ready to compete. Our competitive team trains year-round, participates in local and regional meets, and strives for excellence in every routine.

  • USAG certified coaching
  • Competition travel
  • Goal-oriented training
  • College prep support
Learn More
Bronze - Diamond

Xcel Program

A flexible competitive track that allows gymnasts to compete with modified requirements. Perfect for athletes who want to compete but need a more flexible training schedule.

  • Flexible scheduling
  • Competitive opportunities
  • Skill-appropriate requirements
  • Fun team atmosphere
Learn More
Ages 8-12

Ballet

Complement your gymnastics training with ballet! Our ballet classes focus on technique, grace, and the fundamental movements that enhance rhythmic gymnastics performance.

  • Technical foundation
  • Grace & poise
  • Flexibility enhancement
  • Performance skills
Learn More
All Ages

Multi-Sport Flexibility

Cross-training for dancers, cheerleaders, figure skaters, and athletes. Improve flexibility, strength, and body awareness to enhance performance in your primary sport.

  • Sport-specific training
  • Flexibility focus
  • Strength building
  • Open to all athletes
Learn More

Not Sure Which Program?

Contact us for a free assessment. We'll help you find the perfect fit for your child's age, skill level, and goals.

Schedule Free Assessment

Ready to Start Your Journey?

Book a free trial class and discover the magic of rhythmic gymnastics.

Book Free Trial

Where Grace Meets Strength

Premier rhythmic gymnastics academy in McKinney, Texas. Building confident athletes through expert coaching and a supportive community.
